message:
chore(lib): Export new core modules and StorageError type

Update wa-core library exports to include the new modules and make
StorageError publicly accessible.

New module exports:
- pub mod crash: Runtime health monitoring and shutdown tracking
- pub mod ipc: Unix socket communication for daemon
- pub mod tailer: Adaptive pane polling supervisor

Re-export changes:
- Add StorageError to public re-exports alongside Error and Result

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
